description: Use this API to change the value of a character ICON (i.e., an element of the CHRICN array) of an auxiliary signal model of a specified two-terminal dc line. The corresponding integer ICON is set to 0. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_ttdcauxmod_chricn(dc, isgndx, model, j, chdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_ttdcauxmod_chricn(dc, isgndx, model, j, chdata)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line receiving the of the auxiliary signal model; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: isgndx
parameters.description: Auxiliary signal injection point number, or the auxiliary signal index. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model (1 for icon(i), 2 for icon(i+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: chdata
parameters.description: New character icon value. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: invalid ISGNDX value for a two-terminal dc line.
no auxiliary signal model at this index for this two-terminal dc line.
model at this index for this two-terminal dc line is aaa not xxx.
no input ICONs used in model.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
